name: No witnesses to my forklift injury in Riverton, can I claim?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my forklift injury in Riverton, can I claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical proof and your account work.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, your testimony, medical records, and circumstantial evidence suffice.**[6]

Workers' comp doesn't require witnesses; focus on medical causation from work.

- Photos of scene/equipment.
- Supervisor statements.
- Consistent doctor history.

Build case early. Insurers deny solo claims often; lawyer helps.

description: Yes, medical proof and your account work.[6]
